englishDefinitions: Used informally to tell someone to go out and find a romantic or sexual partner.
A slangy expression meaning to go out and try to meet someone attractive.
persianTranslation: برو بیرون و دنبال دوست‌دختر/دوست‌پسر بگرد
examples: After the breakup, his friends told him to get out and get him some.
He was joking when he said it was time to go out and get you some.
The phrase is casual and can sound rude in some situations.
